summary: This topic details how to view the monthly salary summary for employees and make necessary adjustments to individual salary components, such as adding advance recovery or modifying basic pay, for a specific month.
steps: Navigate to HRM > Salary Summary Month Wise.
Select the 'Year' and 'Month' for which you want to view salaries.
Click 'Go'. (Leaving other fields blank will display data for all employees.)
A list of employees with their processed salaries (Gross, Deduction, Paid Salary) will be displayed.
To view or edit a specific employee's salary, click the 'View' option corresponding to that employee.
The employee's complete salary structure for the selected month will open.
Make the desired changes (e.g., adjust basic pay, add/remove earning/deduction heads like 'Advance Recovery').
Enter the amount for the change (e.g., 11000 for advance recovery). The system will automatically recalculate Gross Salary, Deduction, and Paid Salary.
business_rules: Any changes made to a processed salary must be accompanied by remarks to be successfully saved and reflected.
important_notes: Changes made in this section are specific to the *processed salary for that particular month* and do not alter the employee's underlying salary contract (template).
If a required earning or deduction head is not available, it must first be created in the Payroll Master settings.
questions: How can I see the detailed salary breakdown for an employee for a specific month?
Can I deduct an advance from an employee's salary after it has been processed?
How do I add a new deduction or earning to an employee's salary for a particular month?
Why is it mandatory to add remarks when saving changes to a processed salary?
Where can I find the gross salary, deduction amount, and paid salary for an employee?
related_topics: Creating and Managing Earning and Deduction Heads
